USC ITS Learning Environments – LE Bot

Pick the issue and the “LE bot” will walk you through the next best step one at a time. If you are stuck click on the Flowchart Reference button.

Pick the issue and the “LE bot” will walk you through the next best step one at a time. If you are stuck click on the Flowchart Reference button.

Guided troubleshooting

Select an issue to begin and feel free to use the flowchart guide as reference. (Click on Flowchart Reference for additional help)
Choose an issue from the left to start the live support path.

Suggested use: open this in a browser during training or live support. The issue is selected first, the bot walks the user through the steps, and the matching flowchart stays visible as a visual reference.
